'''zhopadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:upcore|upcore]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:upcore|upcore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhopadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhopadithi|zhopadithi]] || [[word:zhopadiji|zhopadiji]] || [[word:zhopadishi|zhopadishi]] || [[word:zhopadiki|zhopadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhopaduthuthu|zhopaduthuthu]] || [[word:zhopadujuju|zhopadujuju]] || [[word:zhopadushushu|zhopadushushu]] || [[word:zhopadukuku|zhopadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhopaduthu|zhopaduthu]] || [[word:zhopaduju|zhopaduju]] || [[word:zhopadushu|zhopadushu]] || [[word:zhopaduku|zhopaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhopadufthuf|zhopadufthuf]] || [[word:zhopadufjuf|zhopadufjuf]] || [[word:zhopadufshuf|zhopadufshuf]] || [[word:zhopadufkuf|zhopadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhopadethe|zhopadethe]] || [[word:zhopadeje|zhopadeje]] || [[word:zhopadeshe|zhopadeshe]] || [[word:zhopadeke|zhopadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhopadothotho|zhopadothotho]] || [[word:zhopadojojo|zhopadojojo]] || [[word:zhopadoshosho|zhopadoshosho]] || [[word:zhopadokoko|zhopadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhopadotho|zhopadotho]] || [[word:zhopadojo|zhopadojo]] || [[word:zhopadosho|zhopadosho]] || [[word:zhopadoko|zhopadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhopadofthof|zhopadofthof]] || [[word:zhopadofjof|zhopadofjof]] || [[word:zhopadofshof|zhopadofshof]] || [[word:zhopadofkof|zhopadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfthĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfjĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfshĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfkĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfthĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfjĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfshĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfkĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfthĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfjĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfshĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhopadĂŻfkĂŻf|zhopadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhopadĂŠthĂŠ|zhopadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhopadĂŠjĂŠ|zhopadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhopadĂŠshĂŠ|zhopadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhopadĂŠkĂŠ|zhopadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhopadathatha|zhopadathatha]] || [[word:zhopadajaja|zhopadajaja]] || [[word:zhopadashasha|zhopadashasha]] || [[word:zhopadakaka|zhopadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhopadatha|zhopadatha]] || [[word:zhopadaja|zhopadaja]] || [[word:zhopadasha|zhopadasha]] || [[word:zhopadaka|zhopadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhopadafthaf|zhopadafthaf]] || [[word:zhopadafjaf|zhopadafjaf]] || [[word:zhopadafshaf|zhopadafshaf]] || [[word:zhopadafkaf|zhopadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhopadasha|zhopadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhopadshĂ«sha|zhopadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhopadrosha|zhopadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhopadmusha|zhopadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhopadyasha|zhopadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhopadnkshĂ«sha|gozhopadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhopadnkrosha|gozhopadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhopadnkmusha|gozhopadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhopadnkyasha|gozhopadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhopapadasha|zhopapadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhopapadshĂ«sha|zhopapadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhopapadrosha|zhopapadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhopapadmusha|zhopapadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhopapadyasha|zhopapadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhopapadnkshĂ«sha|gozhopapadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhopapadnkrosha|gozhopapadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhopapadnkmusha|gozhopapadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhopapadnkyasha|gozhopapadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhepĂŠdasha|zhepĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhepĂŠdshĂ«sha|zhepĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhepĂŠdrosha|zhepĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhepĂŠdmusha|zhepĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhepĂŠdyasha|zhepĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhepĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|gozhepĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhepĂŠdnkrosha|gozhepĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhepĂŠdnkmusha|gozhepĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhepĂŠdnkyasha|gozhepĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhopfadasha|zhopfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhopfadshĂ«sha|zhopfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhopfadrosha|zhopfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhopfadmusha|zhopfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhopfadyasha|zhopfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhopfadnkshĂ«sha|gozhopfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhopfadnkrosha|gozhopfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhopfadnkmusha|gozhopfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhopfadnkyasha|gozhopfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
